race.comment: Scorching pace where some of the main chances might cut at each other. With that in mind, MISS KEEDS (7) might be the one in the stalking role throughout. Well off best last time at Hobart but has a good record here and drawn the inside with the steady hands of Sanderson aboard. Will be looking for a run late. FLUFFY'S GIRL (8) returns to the synthetic and has run well in both starts here. Has a low draw and the claim and looks well placed here. Will go forward and give a sight. THE REAL MAN (5) is another who goes well here and will also push forward. Looks a strong winning hope on best. HOULIHAN (9) was a winner here fresh then gave a sight here last time and was run down right on the line. Another on speed chance who will give a sight. STARS IN THE NIGHT (11)  has a super consistent record here and will be charging home late.
